subcodes.first_line: O thou remnant of that exalted personage! Thy noble father was a mine of mysteries and the recipient of effulgence in the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن شخص جلیل پدر بزرگوار معدن اسرار بود و مهبط آن وار در ساحت اقدس
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @soul; spirit after death, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @symbolism
